## THE ONE ACTION
Generate a trivial test SVG for export validation; explicitly do NOT use any customer artwork.

## COMMAND(S) TO RUN
```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
svg='<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="50" height="50"><rect x="5" y="5" width="40" height="40" fill="black"/></svg>'
open('../artifacts/test_shape.svg','w').write(svg)
print('wrote test_shape.svg')
PY
```
